Notice Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. WILLIAM F. STANGER, ESQ. of Boornazian, Jensen & Garthe APC, Tel No. 510-834-4350 appearing for Petitioner Ryan Associates;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER RYAN ASSOCIATES' Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
